title: Travel filter pill on Amex credit cards page not selecting / no visible response to clicks
description: On https://www.americanexpress.com/us/credit-cards/ the filter pill row shows options like All Cards, Featured (selected), Travel, Cash Back. Repeatedly clicking the Travel pill does not switch the selected state from Featured to Travel and the filter summary continues to read 'Featured Charge and Credit Cards'. Click actions often result in 'NO element focused' indicating the click may be missing or the pill is not responding.
expected_behavior: Clicking the 'Travel' filter pill should highlight/select it and update the results list and the filter summary to Travel cards.
actual_behavior: Clicks on the 'Travel' pill have no visible effect; Featured remains selected and results do not update.
steps_to_reproduce: Scroll to the 'Filter by' pill row
